{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Oblivion Wine
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Oblivion Wine]] is sold by the [[Fallen Leaf]] elders one year after the opening of the [[Nethergate]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c4">''Unsouled'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
